description_long: This is a tall, freestanding retail display kiosk branded with 'Wondercide', designed to showcase and dispense spray bottles of pet care products. The kiosk features a rectangular base in blue, supporting a two-tiered shelving unit with clear front panels that hold multiple spray bottles. The upper section includes a prominent printed sign with product information, a logo, and an image of a dog and a person, making it visually appealing and informative. The sides of the shelving unit are green with white text highlighting the product's benefits, while the back is plain blue and white, lacking any display or product access. The structure appears to be made primarily of printed cardboard or corrugated board, with transparent plastic panels on the shelves. This kiosk is intended for indoor placement in commercial or retail environments, such as pet stores or supermarkets.
description: A tall, branded retail display kiosk for Wondercide pet sprays, featuring two clear shelves, colorful printed signage, and a sturdy blue base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Wondercide branding, two shelves filled with spray bottles, and a large printed sign with product information and imagery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green side panel with product claims and the clear profile of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain blue and white back panel with no signage or product access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green side panel and the edge of the clear shelving, with less visible product detail.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed above the shelves and on side panels, with visible text such as 'Wondercide', product benefits, and an image of a dog and person.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, vertical extension of the back panel forming a signboard, made of printed cardboard.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial display with minimalist branding and functional design.
